name: KittenMouse: Summer Of Love
short_description: First Person Shooter, with a full single player campaign and story. Fight through 5 fiery and action packed levels, and enjoy the inspiring story of one man determined to defend his town! Multiple weapon and enemy types.
detailed_description:
It's the Summer of 2020, and the town is ablaze with fiery Riots!
One man fights for justice, against the Mob.

A first person shooter, with multiple weapon types!
A single player campaign with 5 Action Packed Levels!
A thrilling story of one mans fight to safeguard his community!

You play as KittenMouse, as he protects his home, his town, and his local car dealership, during the fiery "Summer Of Love" 2020!
